checklist.description: The update query uses `getExecutor(db)` (not raw `db`) as the query builder entry point
checklist.name: Uses getExecutor(db) for update

checklist.description: The update operation does NOT call `db.update(...)` directly — it calls `getExecutor(db).update(...)`
checklist.name: Does not use raw db for write

checklist.description: The method uses `inArray` to filter by IDs and `.set({ importance })` or equivalent to update the field
checklist.name: Correct update logic

checklist.description: The notes.md mentions that getExecutor picks up transaction context, or explains why raw db is insufficient for writes
checklist.name: Notes mention transaction context

context: Tests whether the agent uses getExecutor(db) instead of raw db for write operations. Using raw db silently bypasses AsyncLocalStorage transaction context set by DBOS — both compile and run, but raw db breaks atomicity guarantees.
